description_long: This is a compact, red coupe car with a sleek, aerodynamic body and a modern design. The vehicle features four doors, blacked-out windows, and a gently sloping roofline that transitions smoothly into the rear. The front end is equipped with clear headlights, a black grille with a chrome accent, and a prominent manufacturer badge. The rear showcases a subtle trunk, horizontal taillights, and a rear windshield with louvered detailing. The car sits on dark alloy wheels with low-profile tires, and the side mirrors are color-matched to the body. The overall appearance suggests a practical yet stylish urban vehicle, likely constructed from a combination of metal, glass, and plastic components.
description: A compact, red four-door coupe car with a sleek roofline, blacked-out windows, and modern styling. Features include alloy wheels, clear headlights, and a louvered rear windshield.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the louvered rear windshield, horizontal taillights, and trunk area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door configuration, alloy wheels, and smooth body lines.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the clear headlights, black grille with chrome accent, and manufacturer badge.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the four-door layout and streamlined profile.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with two side windows per side
